records.statement: Deacon follows the written spec for this behavior while the reference CLI deviates from it.
records.notes: US3 scenario 1: spec conformant, reference divergent, decision follow-spec. Case-backed.

records.statement: The spec does not address this behavior, so deacon matches the reference implementation.
records.notes: US3 scenario 2: spec unspecified, reference aligned, decision align-with-reference. Case-backed.

records.statement: A deacon-only capability with no spec clause and no reference counterpart.
records.notes: US3 scenario 3: spec not-applicable, reference not-applicable, decision deacon-extension. Reported under Extensions, never Divergences.

records.statement: Deacon deliberately does not conform to the spec and diverges from the reference here.
records.notes: spec nonconformant, reference divergent, decision intentional-divergence. Case-backed.
